description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a hip roof, surrounded by a fenced yard featuring a driveway, a walkway, and several trees and shrubs. The exterior walls are painted a light color, and the roof is dark, likely made of asphalt shingles. The front facade includes a small covered entryway and several symmetrically placed windows. The property is bordered by a low fence, and the landscaping includes both grass and paved surfaces. The house appears to have a concrete foundation and standard residential doors and windows. The overall design is simple and functional, typical of suburban neighborhoods.
description: A single-story, hip-roofed bungalow with a light exterior, dark roof, fenced yard, and symmetrical windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, walkway, and two trees flanking the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, side windows, and the rear yard with a large tree.
description_view_2: Rear view with a large tree dominating the right side and a clear view of the back windows and fence.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rear yard, back windows, and a tree near the fence.
